channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Commitcounter - Wed Jul 08 09:09:44 UTC 2026
item.description:
A lightweight plugin that displays your current day GitHub commit count directly in the Android Studio status bar.
vendor: vahitkeskin downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.vahitkeskin.commitcounter.commitcounter
